languages.text: {n}Идира вздрагивает и нервно озирается.{/n} "Шепоточки, тише... Я слышу, да, опасность, да..." {n}Женщина бросает на вас предостерегающий взгляд.{/n}
{n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Идира вздрагивает и нервно озирается.{/n} "Шепоточки, тише... Я слышу, да, опасность, да..." {n}Женщина бросает на вас предостерегающий взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}
{n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}
{n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊迪拉猛地一颤，紧张地环顾四周。{/n}“低语，嘘……我听见了，是的……有危险……”{n}她向你投来警告的一瞥。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊迪拉猛地一颤，紧张地环顾四周。{/n}“低语，嘘……我听见了，是的……有危险……”{n}她向你投来警告的一瞥。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Idira da un paso atrás y mira a su alrededor, nerviosa.{/n} «Lo sé, susurros... Sí, es peligroso...». {n}Te lanza una mirada de advertencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira da un paso atrás y mira a su alrededor, nerviosa.{/n} «Lo sé, susurros... Sí, es peligroso...». {n}Te lanza una mirada de advertencia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Idira tressaille en jetant un regard nerveux alentour.{/n} « Les murmures, le silence... J'entends, oui, le danger, oui... » {n}Elle vous lance un regard d'avertissement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira tressaille en jetant un regard nerveux alentour.{/n} « Les murmures, le silence... J'entends, oui, le danger, oui... » {n}Elle vous lance un regard d'avertissement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İdira, irkilip sinirli bir şekilde etrafa bakınıyor.{/n} "Fısıltılar, sessizlik... Duyuyorum, evet. Tehlike..." {n}Sana uyarıcı bakışlar atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İdira, irkilip sinirli bir şekilde etrafa bakınıyor.{/n} "Fısıltılar, sessizlik... Duyuyorum, evet. Tehlike..." {n}Sana uyarıcı bakışlar atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Idira zuckt zusammen und sieht sich nervös um.{/n} "Schweigt, Flüsterstimmen ... Ich höre, ja, Gefahr, ja ..." {n}Sie wirft dir einen warnenden Blick zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira zuckt zusammen und sieht sich nervös um.{/n} "Schweigt, Flüsterstimmen ... Ich höre, ja, Gefahr, ja ..." {n}Sie wirft dir einen warnenden Blick zu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}イドラは身じろぎをし、不安そうに周囲を見渡す。{/n}「ささやき、静かに…危険、危険…」。{n}あなたはイドラの警告の眼差しを受ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: イドラは身じろぎをし、不安そうに周囲を見渡す。「ささやき、静かに…危険、危険…」。あなたはイドラの警告の眼差しを受ける。
